stemHtml: Point A is at Sea Level and point B is at 10 000 ft. Which one of the following statements is true?

options.a: The sunrise is earlier at point A because of the greater diffraction of sunlight at point B.
options.b: The sunrise is earlier at point B because of the greater horizontal visibility at point B.
options.c: The sunrise is earlier at point A because of the greater reflection of sunlight at point A.
options.d: The sunrise is earlier at point B because of the greater refraction of sunlight at point A.
